query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.companyId, c.name as companyName FROM users u LEFT JOIN companies c ON u.companyId = c.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Camila%' OR u.email LIKE '%camila%' ORDER BY u.createdAt DESC
